images.alt: Selecting the Right Material for 3D Printing

meta_description: We offer multiple elastomer 3D printing options, including: PolyJet, TPU, and silicone. Choose the best material for your application.

sections.heading: Applications for 3D-Printed Elastomers
sections.text: Applications for 3D-Printed Elastomers Elastomeric 3D printing enables the production of complex elastomeric parts and can be a cost-effective prototyping solution for parts that will eventually be injection molded. Custom, patient- or customer-specific parts Seals, gaskets, and grommets Hoses Handles with grip Keypads and buttons Surgical models Overmolding prototypes Wearables
